description: The farmOS Field Kit app is open (or will be launched). Create a new Observation log for an apiary inspection dated August 15, 2025. In the notes field, enter: 'Alcohol wash test for Varroa destructor. Hive #04. Sample taken from upper brood box frames. Weather warm and calm. Infestation level is at treatment threshold.' Record three quantities: 9 'mites' (Label: 'Mite Count'), 300 'bees' (Label: 'Sample Size'), and 3 '%' (Label: 'Infestation Rate'). Save the log and verify it appears in the list.
